title: YTPMV - Vince Sets Up Shop In Volcano Valley
description:
I know DJStevePorter already pefected this source, but I still wanted to do something of my own with it. I spent a bit more time on visuals and effects than I have in the past. I'm really pleased with how this turned out. ^_^

The backing track is Volcano Valley (Act 2) from Sonic 3D Blast. The rap portion, of course, comes from Mr. Vince Offer and his fabulous infomercials.

DISCLAIMER: I don't own any of these clips. This video does not represent the opinions of the original creators of these clips. I am not profiting from their use in any way.
